text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio says she wants to have a change of
pace, so I accompany her for some karaoke.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Karaoke is so fun, isn't it? We get to sing and
dance! ♪ And most of all―

text_block_list.name: Karaoke Staff
text_block_list.text: Excuse me. Here are your three party platters.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm stuffed! Okay, on to the next song...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? What's wrong, Trainer? Is something on
my face?
choice_data_list: Maybe you should ease up a bit.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Why? You think I'm gonna put on too much
weight or something?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine! It's fine! I have complete and total
control over my health!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I would never do anything to harm my races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, a fast-paced song starts to play. It has
an intricate dance routine that Teio's rather fond
of.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If you're so worried, then watch this! I'll show you
my ultimate Teio Step dance routine!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... Wow, my body feels really... heavy...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ohhh nooo! No, no, no, NO!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What should I do?! Here! You eat everything
that's left!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And, um, can you give me some special training
to fix this ASAP?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ughhh! I'm definitely gonna bounce back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Tokai Teio manages get back into
shape and is once again able to gracefully
perform her Teio Step.
